quantitative.description: Quantitative research involves collecting and analyzing numerical data

qualitative.description: Qualitative research involves collecting and analyzing non-numerical data

mixed_methods.description: Combines both quantitative and qualitative approaches
mixed_methods.best_for: Complex research questions requiring multiple perspectives

APA.name: American Psychological Association
APA.reference_example: Smith, J. (2023). Title of article. Journal Name, 10(2), 123-145.

MLA.name: Modern Language Association
MLA.reference_example: Smith, John. "Title of Article." Journal Name, vol. 10, no. 2, 2023, pp. 123-145.

Chicago.name: Chicago Manual of Style
Chicago.reference_example: Smith, John. "Title of Article." Journal Name 10, no. 2 (2023): 123-145.
